description.ko: 수학적 질서가 흑요석 파편의 정교한 소용돌이로 부서지는 디지털 붕괴의 브루탈리즘적 연구.
description.en: A brutalist study of digital disintegration where mathematical order shatters into a precise vortex of obsidian shards.

prompt: A digital sculpture by KURO-X, titled 'The Monolith Fracture.' A massive #1A1A1A obsidian prism captured during a hyper-geometric collapse, shattering into #808080 and #C0C0C0 razor-sharp polygonal shards within a #FFFFFF clinical void. Heavy digital glitch artifacts, pixel sorting, and extreme RGB chromatic aberration intersect the sharp planes. High-contrast ray-traced reflections on shifting obsidian surfaces. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution.
